summary: Senior data engineering professional with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience and deep hands-on background in Python, SQL, PySpark, ETL/ELT pipelines, data quality, reconciliation, production support, and operational reporting. Experienced building validation routines, monitoring data pipelines, investigating production issues, and delivering trusted analytics datasets in regulated, high-scale environments. Strong fit for data quality engineering roles that require testable pipelines, query-based validation, root-cause analysis, stakeholder-facing scorecards, and quality gates for data platforms.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected and supported Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual processes with repeatable data preparation, validation, and reporting workflows.
Built data quality and validation routines to identify incomplete, inconsistent, and anomalous infrastructure telemetry before downstream reporting and forecasting consumption.
Used SQL, Oracle data modeling, partitioning concepts, and performance tuning to support reliable historical data stores for analytics, reporting, and capacity planning use cases.
Performed root-cause analysis on production data issues across monitoring feeds including BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, and AppDynamics, improving reliability of operational reporting outputs.
Developed dashboards and reports using Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly to expose capacity trends, data quality concerns, and operational health signals to senior stakeholders.
Partnered with infrastructure, application, and analytics teams to refine requirements, validate outputs, and maintain trusted datasets used for executive reporting and forecasting decisions.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for critical Brand.com and hospitality systems, validating transaction visibility and monitoring coverage for customer-facing platforms.
Led the FAST project by data-mining real-user and synthetic performance metrics to identify optimization opportunities adopted by engineering teams.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace to correlate load test results with APM telemetry, strengthening performance validation and release-readiness evidence.
Implemented End-User Monitoring and transaction tracing across web and mobile flows, helping teams detect quality regressions and performance anomalies before customer impact.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial-services environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents, supporting production observability and operational reliability.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and management modules adopted as standards across client environments.
Built Perl and Korn Shell automation for performance reporting and data extraction, replacing manual weekly exports with more repeatable processes.
Delivered technical documentation and training to improve consistency of monitoring, troubleshooting, and production support practices across teams.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving transaction correctness and query performance.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation and testing frameworks to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.
Automated schema conversion and data validation workflows to support phased cutover, reconciliation, and production readiness.
Optimized database access paths and transaction processing to reduce hardware footprint while maintaining sub-second query latency.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell, XML, JSON, YAML, Java concepts
skills.Data Quality & Validation: Data quality checks, reconciliation, anomaly detection, completeness validation, consistency validation, freshness checks, query-based validation, root-cause analysis, quality scorecards
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, data modeling, data warehouses, data lakes, batch processing, production pipeline support, metadata management, data dictionaries, operational reporting
skills.Big Data & Cloud: Apache Spark, PySpark, Hadoop/Hive, AWS S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Amazon Redshift, EC2, ECS, Azure/ADLS/Databricks/Snowflake concepts
skills.Testing & Automation: pytest, automated validation, pipeline test design, CI/CD concepts, Git/GitHub workflows, logging, error handling, runbooks, production support
skills.Monitoring & Observability: Dynatrace AppMon, Gomez Synthetic Monitoring, CA APM/Introscope, BMC TrueSight/TSCO, AppDynamics, transaction tracing, dashboards, alert thresholds
skills.Analytics & Reporting: Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, Qlik exposure, Power BI concepts, stakeholder reporting, performance and capacity analytics
skills.AI/ML Adjacent: Forecasting pipelines, Prophet, scikit-learn, telemetry analysis, GenAI/RAG workflow projects, LLM output quality concepts

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark forecasting and analytics platform that transformed infrastructure telemetry into trusted capacity insights. Emphasized data validation, reproducible processing, stakeholder dashboards, and production-quality forecasting outputs.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, and PySpark patterns, including columnar storage, data partitioning, validation concepts, and cost-aware query optimization.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an agentic Python pipeline with semantic duplicate detection, JSON quality gates, validation checks, and automated artifact generation. Demonstrates applied quality engineering around structured outputs, automation, and guardrails.
